title: The Sweetest Odyssey
premise: A tiny astronaut crash-lands on a vibrant candy planet and must navigate its sugary landscapes to repair their ship and return home.

chapters.title: Marshmallow Mound Landing
chapters.setting: A soft, bouncy landscape of giant marshmallows and fluffy cotton candy clouds under a pastel sky. Gumdrop trees dot the horizon, and streams of sparkling lemonade flow gently.
chapters.narration: You awaken to a gentle bounce, your ship a wreck amidst a sea of fluffy white. You've crash-landed on a planet made entirely of sweets!

mission.description: Your ship is damaged! Find the primary power cog lost somewhere in the marshmallow mounds to get started on repairs.
mission.success_text: You found the power cog! Now to find the main repair station.
mission.fail_text: The cog is too important to leave behind! Try again.

chapters.title: Lollipop Forest Foraging
chapters.setting: A dense forest of towering, swirling lollipops and candy cane trees, with rivers of flowing caramel and paths paved with colorful sprinkles under a bright, sugary sun.
chapters.narration: Deeper into the candy world you venture, where the lollipop trees scrape the pastel sky. More ship components are needed, but beware of the local sweet-toothed inhabitants.

mission.description: Gather 5 vital circuit clusters from within the Lollipop Forest to fix your ship's navigation system. Watch out for mischievous Gummy Grubs!
mission.success_text: You've collected enough circuits! Your navigation system is back online.
mission.fail_text: You still need more circuits! Don't let the Gummy Grubs get the best of you.

chapters.title: The Dark Chocolate Core
chapters.setting: A cavernous, dimly lit core made of rich, dark chocolate and hard candy crystals, with molten fudge rivers and glowing sugar veins. A faint, sweet aroma fills the air.
chapters.narration: You've reached the planet's heart, a dark chocolate cavern rumored to hold the final, most crucial ship part. But the legendary Jawbreaker Juggernaut guards this sweet treasure.

mission.description: Defeat the mighty Jawbreaker Juggernaut and its Gummy Grub minions to retrieve the final ship component and escape the candy planet!
mission.success_text: Victory! The final component is yours. Time to blast off!
mission.fail_text: The Juggernaut is too strong! You must find a way to defeat it.

characters.hero: A tiny, adorable astronaut in a gleaming white space suit with a large, clear bubble helmet. Their suit has small, colorful candy-shaped patches, giving them a whimsical, innocent look.
characters.enemy_1: A wobbly, translucent green Gummy Grub with googly eyes and tiny stubby legs. It leaves a sticky, shimmering trail and makes soft, squishy sounds.
characters.enemy_2: A massive, formidable Jawbreaker Juggernaut, made of swirling, rainbow-colored hard candy, with rocky, crystalline fists and a perpetually grumpy, cracked expression. It shimmers menacingly.
characters.npc: A wise, ancient Peppermint Elder, a tall, striped candy cane figure with a gentle, glowing aura and a kindly, wrinkled face made of soft mint. It has a long, flowing white beard.
characters.coin: Sparkling, iridescent sugar crystals that float and twinkle with soft, pastel light, emitting a faint, sweet chime.
characters.health: Bright red, heart-shaped lollipops on a stick, glowing softly with restorative energy.
characters.key: An intricate, glowing cogwheel made of spun sugar, slowly rotating and emitting a gentle, sugary scent.
characters.platform: Soft, square-cut marshmallow blocks that gently compress when stepped on, or flat, frosted gingerbread tiles decorated with icing.
characters.breakable: Blocks of brittle, striped hard candy that shatter into sparkling shards and a puff of sugar dust when hit.
characters.exit_door: A shimmering, circular portal made of swirling, multi-colored spun sugar, gently pulsing with an inviting, ethereal light.
